SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
SELECT 
	   alertGroupID AS alertGroupKey
      ,alertGroupCode
      ,alertGroupDescription
      ,displayText
      ,sortOrder
	  ,isActive
FROM alertGroup
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t 
USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript) s 
    ON s.alertGroupKey = t.alertGroupKey
WHEN MATCHED
THEN UPDATE SET  
     alertGroupCode = s.alertGroupCode
    ,alertGroupDescription = s.alertGroupDescription
    ,displayText = s.displayText
    ,sortOrder = s.sortOrder 
	,isActive = s.isActive
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN  
INSERT(
     alertGroupKey
    ,alertGroupCode
    ,alertGroupDescription
    ,displayText
    ,sortOrder 
	,isActive
) 
VALUES ( 
    s.alertGroupKey
    ,s.alertGroupCode
    ,s.alertGroupDescription
    ,s.displayText
    ,s.sortOrder
	,s.isActive
)
